Giving you and your loved ones the confidence of a safe drive, every time Mitigates Collisions Using Advanced Technology Honda SENSING Ω uses a high performance front camera with a wide-angle, far-reaching detection system to help alert the driver and minimise risk of accidents. Design An impression to remember Delivering on the promise of Outclass Style, Sophistication and Comfort Exteriors Interiors Utilities Cluster and infotainment Convenience Progressive, classy and impactful Signature Chequered Flag Pattern Grille LED Projector Headlamps with Integrated DRLs & Turn Indicators LED Projector Fog Lamps Classy Diamond-cut Alloy Wheels Shark-fin Antenna Iconic Wing-shaped LED Rear Lights Next Prev Request A Callback Technology Outclass Performance Enjoy the true pleasure of Driving Engine Transmission Safety Honda Connect Next Prev Download brochure MORE SPECIFICATIONS Accessories Outclass Accessories ALL ACCESSORIES BASIC KIT SIGNATURE PACKAGE UTILITY PACKAGE Style your Amaze, just the way you want. Choose from a wide range of accessories to create your own unique and personalized Honda Amaze. RHYTHMIC AMBIENT LIGHTS – 7 COLOURS ARM REST – BEIGE ARM REST – BLACK STEP ILLUMINATION TRUNK SPOILER VERTICAL PATTERN CROSS PATTERN (TAN & BLACK) SQUARE PATTERN CROSS PATTERN (BEIGE & BLACK) Ventilated Seat Top Cover With Massager – Beige Ventilated Seat Top Cover With Massager - Black FRONT PARKING SENSOR FRONT FENDER GARNISH FRONT GRILLE GARNISH FOG LAMP GARNISH FRONT BUMPER GARNISH DOOR LOWER GARNISH REAR BUMPER LOWER GARNISH DOOR WINDOW CHROME MOLDING TAIL LAMP GARNISH TRUNK GARNISH DOOR HANDLE PROTECTOR DOOR EDGE GARNISH BUMPER CORNER PROTECTOR (FRONT AND REAR) SIDE BODY PROTECTOR STEERING WHEEL COVER BODY COVER TRUNK TRAY BUCKET MAT DOOR VISOR WITH CHROME DOOR MIRROR GARNISH MUD GUARD SET FOG LIGHT* REAR CAMERA WITH GUIDELINES TPMS (Display in H-Connect App) DRIVE VIEW RECORDER HEADREST CUSHION SUNSHADE DUAL CHARGER – A & C TYPE HUMIDIFIER Next Prev Download brochure Expert Connect Mesmerising Moments ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ Check Other Models You may also like ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ FAQs What is the mileage of Honda Amaze? The powerful 1.2L i-VTEC petrol engine offers an amazing mileage of 18.65 km/l* in the manual transmission and 19.46 km/l* in the CVT(Automatic) transmission . *T&C Apply What are the colours available in Honda Amaze? Honda Amaze is available in the following colours: Meteoroid Grey Metallic, Radiant Red Metallic, Platinum White Pearl, Lunar Silver Metallic, Golden Brown Metallic, Obsidian Blue Pearl and Crystal Black Pearl What is the boot space of Honda Amaze? Honda Amaze has the boot space of 416 Litres. What are the safety features available in Honda Amaze? The All New Honda Amaze is equipped with 28+ Active & Passive Safety features such as : Honda Sensing , Six airbags, 3 points ELR safety Seat belts, Vehicle stability assist, and many more. Is Honda Amaze available in diesel version in India? No Are LPG/CNG versions available of Honda Amaze in India? Government approved CNG kit retrofitment facility is available through Honda dealers for select variants of All New Amaze. What are the engine specifications of Honda Amaze? Honda Amaze is available in SOHC i-VTEC Petrol Engine with 4 cylinders and offers Manual and CVT transmissions. The powerful 1.2L i-VTEC petrol engine offers an amazing mileage of 18.65 km/l* in the manual transmission and 19.46 km/l* in the CVT(Automatic) transmission . *T&C Apply What are the colours available in Honda Amaze? Honda Amaze is available in the following colours: Meteoroid Grey Metallic, Radiant Red Metallic, Platinum White Pearl, Lunar Silver Metallic, Golden Brown Metallic, Obsidian Blue Pearl and Crystal Black Pearl What is the boot space of Honda Amaze? Honda Amaze has the boot space of 416 Litres. What are the safety features available in Honda Amaze? The All New Honda Amaze is equipped with 28+ Active & Passive Safety features such as : Honda Sensing , Six airbags, 3 points ELR safety Seat belts, Vehicle stability assist, and many more. Is Honda Amaze available in diesel version in India? No Are LPG/CNG versions available of Honda Amaze in India? Government approved CNG kit retrofitment facility is available through Honda dealers for select variants of All New Amaze. What are the engine specifications of Honda Amaze? Honda Amaze is available in SOHC i-VTEC Petrol Engine with 4 cylinders and offers Manual and CVT transmissions.
